title: coleus auriglandulosus
intro: Coleus auriglandulosus, also known as Golden Finger or Finger Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Coleus auriglandulosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and exhibit antiseptic properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
